<!-- Generated with https://github.com/reakaleek/gh-action-readme -->

# <!--name-->Publish npm Package<!--/name-->

<!--description-->
Publish an npm package with configurable access, provenance, registry, and dry-run behavior.
<!--/description-->

## Inputs

<!--inputs-->
| Name                | Description                           | Required | Default  |
|---------------------|---------------------------------------|----------|----------|
| `access`            | npm publish access level.             | `false`  | `public` |
| `provenance`        | Publish with npm provenance.          | `false`  | `true`   |
| `ignore-scripts`    | Pass --ignore-scripts to npm publish. | `false`  | `true`   |
| `dry-run`           | Pass --dry-run to npm publish.        | `false`  | `false`  |
| `tag`               | Optional npm distribution tag.        | `false`  | ` `      |
| `registry-url`      | Optional npm registry URL.            | `false`  | ` `      |
| `working-directory` | Directory containing package.json.    | `false`  | `.`      |
<!--/inputs-->

## Outputs

<!--outputs-->
| Name | Description |
|------|-------------|
<!--/outputs-->

## Usage

<!--usage action="Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/publish-npm-package" version="main"-->

```yaml
steps:
 - name: "Publish to npm"
   uses: "Nick2bad4u/workflow-templates/.github/actions/publish-npm-package@main"
   env:
    NODE_AUTH_TOKEN: "${{ secrets.NPM_TOKEN }}"
```

<!--/usage-->
